parameters.name: kind
parameters.description:
- ACCOUNT_KIND_PERSONAL_CHECKING_RSD: lični tekući RSD  (TT=11/13/14/15/16/17 by subtype)
 - ACCOUNT_KIND_PERSONAL_FX: lični devizni     (TT=21)
 - ACCOUNT_KIND_BUSINESS_CHECKING_RSD: poslovni tekući   (TT=12)
 - ACCOUNT_KIND_BUSINESS_FX: poslovni devizni  (TT=22)
 - ACCOUNT_KIND_SYSTEM: bank-owned house  (TT=99, internal)
 - ACCOUNT_KIND_FOREX_BOOK: bank's per-currency FX inventory book (internal, addressable for actuary trading)
 - ACCOUNT_KIND_STATE_TAX: RSD destination for capital-gains tax remittance (internal)
 - ACCOUNT_KIND_FUND: investment fund's liquidity account (c4 PR3, spec p.74; FundsOwnerID sentinel as owner)

post.summary:
RunMaintenanceFeeJob debits the monthly maintenance fee from every
account due for it. Normally driven by the scheduler service; exposed
as an RPC so ops can fire it on demand. Admin-only.

RunSpentResetJob zeroes the daily/monthly spent counters that are due
to roll over. Normally driven by the scheduler service; admin-only.

patch.summary:
UpdateAccountName implements spec p.20 "Promena naziva računa".
Only the account owner may rename. The new name must differ from
the current name and must not collide with another active account
owned by the same client. No verification gate — renaming doesn't
move money, and the spec p.20 popup doesn't require a code (only
limit changes do).

post.summary:
RunDailyResetActuaries is exposed for manual triggers; the same
codepath runs nightly at 23:59 (Belgrade) via the trading cron.

patch.summary:
UpdateCardLimit changes a card's per-card spending limit (flow.pdf
P6 "Klijent menja limit kartice"). Verification-gated by the
gateway middleware — same policy as account-limit changes.

post.summary:
CreateClient is the entry point used by the bank's account-creation
flow (spec p.9 footnote: "Zaposleni kreira Klijenta prilikom
kreiranja računa"). The activation email reuses the employee path:
the new client gets a link to set their initial password.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: 1-indexed; 0 → 1

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: default 50, max 200

parameters.name: id
parameters.description:
Empty = no change for every field except id. We use IGNORE_IF_ZERO_VALUE
so the format checks fire only when the caller actually populates the
field.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description:
When set, only the rows for that base currency are returned (e.g.
RSD → * for the menjačnica board).

post.summary:
RefreshFXRates does one fetch+upsert pass of the external FX feed.
Normally driven by the scheduler service; exposed so ops can fire it
on demand. Requires ExchangeWrite (or admin).

get.summary:
ListFunds returns the fund discovery list (spec p.71). Supervisors
and clients with funds.read.* can browse; rows include total_value,
profit, and minimum_contribution for sorting/filtering.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: status: "active" (default), "any".

parameters.name: managerUserId
parameters.description: Filter by manager (supervisor view).

parameters.name: minContributionAtLeast
parameters.description:
Filter by minimum_contribution range (RSD, decimal strings).
Empty disables the bound.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort: "name" (default), "total_value", "profit", "minimum_contribution".

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: "asc" (default) or "desc".

post.summary:
CreateFund mints a new fund (supervisor only — spec p.74). Bank
service is called internally to open the fund's RSD account; the
creator becomes the default manager.

get.summary:
ListFundPositions returns the caller's positions across all funds
(clients) or a specified user's (supervisors/admin). Supervisors
may pass the BankAsClient sentinel UUID to see the bank's stakes
(FE-FUND-6, Profit Banke "Bank fund positions").

parameters.name: clientId
parameters.description:
Empty client_id = caller's own positions. Supervisors/admin may
narrow to a specific client (or to the BankAsClient sentinel for
Profit Banke).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: status: "active" (default, units > 0), "any".

post.summary:
RunFundPerformanceSnapshot writes one perf snapshot per active fund.
Admin-only.

get.summary:
GetFund returns the fund detail including its holdings list and the
caller's position when one exists. Spec p.74.

post.summary:
InvestInFund runs the fund_invest SAGA: reserves the source
account, transfers to the fund's bank account (FX hop if needed),
upserts the client_fund_positions row (units math) and writes a
client_fund_transactions row. Verification-gated (FOUND-9).

get.summary:
GetFundPerformance returns the daily liquid_rsd + holdings_value_rsd
time series for a fund. FE-FUND-2 chart.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Sliding window: defaults to 30d when zero.

get.summary:
ListFundTransactions returns the audit log of invest/withdraw rows
for a fund. Supervisors see everything; clients see only their own.

parameters.name: clientId
parameters.description: narrow when caller is supervisor

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: "" / "pending" / "completed" / "failed"

post.summary:
WithdrawFromFund runs the fund_withdraw SAGA. Liquid path (fund
has enough RSD on its bank account) reserves and transfers
directly; illiquid path stays in `pending` while auto-liquidation
orders settle the gap. Verification-gated.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: "price" / "volume" / "maintenance_margin"

parameters.name: from
parameters.description:
Plain YYYY-MM-DD strings (the FE binds these from its date range
picker / isoNDaysAgo). A google.protobuf.Timestamp here cannot be
bound from a bare date query param through grpc-gateway — the
whole request 400s ("cannot parse … as RFC3339") so the price
history chart never received data. Empty means unbounded.

parameters.name: loanType
parameters.description:
- LOAN_TYPE_CASH: gotovinski / keš
 - LOAN_TYPE_HOUSING: stambeni
 - LOAN_TYPE_AUTO: auto
 - LOAN_TYPE_REFINANCE: refinansirajući
 - LOAN_TYPE_STUDENT: studentski

parameters.name: loanType
parameters.description:
- LOAN_TYPE_CASH: gotovinski / keš
 - LOAN_TYPE_HOUSING: stambeni
 - LOAN_TYPE_AUTO: auto
 - LOAN_TYPE_REFINANCE: refinansirajući
 - LOAN_TYPE_STUDENT: studentski

post.summary:
RunInstallmentJob debits any installments that are due today.
Normally driven by the daily cron; exposed as an RPC so tests and
ops can fire it on demand. Admin-only.

RunVariableRateJob refreshes the random pomeraj for every active
variable-rate loan and recomputes its installment amount. Admin-only.
RunStockHistoryBackfill backfills daily-close history. Admin-only.
RunMarketDataRefresh refreshes upstream stock + forex quotes. Admin-only.

QuoteExchange returns the converted-amount preview for a
menjačnica or FX payment, including commission. The FE uses this
to render the transfer-confirmation screen before the user clicks
Potvrdi.

get.summary:
ListNotifications returns the caller's own notifications, newest
first. The recipient is taken from the authenticated principal in
gRPC metadata — never from the request — so a user can only read
their own feed.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: 1-indexed; 0 is treated as 1.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: default 50, max 200.

parameters.name: unreadOnly
parameters.description: When true, only unread notifications are returned.

post.summary:
MarkAllNotificationsRead flips every unread notification of the
caller to read and returns how many were affected.
MarkNotificationRead flips one of the caller's notifications to read.
RunOptionsRefresh regenerates Black-Scholes option chains. Admin-only.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: status: "all", "pending", "approved", "declined", "done".

parameters.name: userKind
parameters.description:
employee/client filter (supervisor view)

 - USER_KIND_FUND: USER_KIND_FUND identifies investment-fund-as-actor rows (c4 PR3,
spec p.74-75). A fund-actor order's user_id is the fund's id; its
settlement account is the fund's bank account. Fund-actor sells do
not write realized_gains rows — funds are pre-tax vehicles; tax
attaches to the client at withdrawal time (EDGE-3).

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: narrow to a single trader

get.summary:
ListOTCContracts drives the "Sklopljeni ugovori" page (spec p.69)
for the caller. Supervisors/admin may filter by user_id.

parameters.name: partyUserId
parameters.description: Supervisor/admin: empty user_id returns all; non-empty narrows.

parameters.name: partyUserKind
parameters.description:
- USER_KIND_FUND: USER_KIND_FUND identifies investment-fund-as-actor rows (c4 PR3,
spec p.74-75). A fund-actor order's user_id is the fund's id; its
settlement account is the fund's bank account. Fund-actor sells do
not write realized_gains rows — funds are pre-tax vehicles; tax
attaches to the client at withdrawal time (EDGE-3).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: "active"/"any"/"" (default "active").

get.summary:
GetOTCContract returns one contract (caller must be a party or
supervisor/admin).

post.summary:
ExerciseOTCContract runs the otc_exercise SAGA on an active
contract (spec p.80 intra-bank): buyer pays qty * strike to seller,
shares transfer, contract flips to `exercised`. Buyer's cost basis
on the received shares is `strike_price`; seller writes a
realized_gains row.

get.summary:
ListPublicHoldings drives the OTC discovery board (spec p.67):
holdings owned by other users that have public_count > reserved_count
are visible. Filterable by ticker.

post.summary:
ExerciseExternalOTCContract runs the external_otc_exercise SAGA
(reserve strike notional → instruct partner to settle → confirm).
Gated by spec p.11 verification on the gateway.

get.summary:
ListExternalPublicHoldings aggregates partner banks' /otc/public
(or Banka2 /public-stock) responses. Gateway fans out across the
configured partner routes and merges. Filters by bank_code and/or
ticker.

parameters.name: bankCode
parameters.description:
Optional filter on partner bank code (e.g. "444"). Empty = all
configured partners.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Optional ticker prefix filter.

get.summary:
ListExternalOTCThreads — drives the "Aktivne ponude (eksterno)"
page. Caller sees threads where they are the local party. Status
filter is optional.

parameters.name: status

post.summary:
CreateExternalOTCOffer opens an outbound negotiation against a
partner-advertised holding. Caller is the buyer; partner is the
seller. The local mirror row is created in 'open' state; the
outbound POST to the partner happens synchronously inside the
call so a 4xx from the partner surfaces immediately.

AcceptExternalOTCOffer accepts the open iteration and mints a
contract via the external_otc_premium SAGA. Premium transfers
cross-bank through the bank-2PC primitive. Gated by spec p.11
verification on the gateway.

CounterExternalOTCOffer appends an iteration; gateway forwards to
the partner. Caller must be the side allowed to counter (the side
that did not move last).

WithdrawExternalOTCOffer pulls the thread. Either party can
withdraw a thread in 'open' state.

get.summary:
GetExternalOTCThread returns the thread + every iteration (oldest
first) + the contract if accepted.

ListOTCThreads drives the "Aktivne ponude" page (spec p.69) — every
thread the caller participates in (as buyer or seller), most-recent
iteration per thread.

parameters.name: partyUserId
parameters.description:
For supervisor/admin views — narrow to a single party. Empty for
self.

parameters.name: partyUserKind
parameters.description:
- USER_KIND_FUND: USER_KIND_FUND identifies investment-fund-as-actor rows (c4 PR3,
spec p.74-75). A fund-actor order's user_id is the fund's id; its
settlement account is the fund's bank account. Fund-actor sells do
not write realized_gains rows — funds are pre-tax vehicles; tax
attaches to the client at withdrawal time (EDGE-3).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: "open" / "any" / "" (default "open").

get.summary:
GetOTCThread returns every iteration in a thread (oldest first).
Drives the thread-detail modal on spec p.69.

post.summary:
AcceptOTCOffer accepts the open iteration in a thread and mints
an active contract via the otc_premium SAGA (premium transfers
from buyer to seller; contract row is created; seller's holding
reservation rolls over from offer to contract).

CounterOfferOTC appends a new iteration to an existing thread. The
prior open row flips to `superseded`; reservation is adjusted if
quantity changed. modified_by tracks which party last touched the
thread (drives the FE unread badge).

WithdrawOTCOffer pulls a thread out of negotiation. Either party
may call; the open row flips to `withdrawn` and the seller's
reservation is released.
RunOTCExpirySweep expires OTC contracts past settlement. Admin-only.

SubmitCrossBankPayment kicks off the 2PC saga. Synchronous to
saga completion (or parking on a transient bank-side error) — the
user gets the final state back in the response, or `running` if
the saga was parked for retry.
post.description:
Idempotency: client-supplied idempotency_key combined with
(user_id, source_account_id) produces a deterministic
transaction_id; retries with the same key replay the existing
saga row instead of double-charging.

get.summary:
GetCrossBankPayment fetches a saga row by transaction_id.
Auth: only the originator (or admin) sees their payment.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: For supervisor view; clients/agents see only their own.

parameters.name: userKind
parameters.description:
- USER_KIND_FUND: USER_KIND_FUND identifies investment-fund-as-actor rows (c4 PR3,
spec p.74-75). A fund-actor order's user_id is the fund's id; its
settlement account is the fund's bank account. Fund-actor sells do
not write realized_gains rows — funds are pre-tax vehicles; tax
attaches to the client at withdrawal time (EDGE-3).

post.summary:
ExerciseOption is spec p.61.d — actuaries may exercise an in-the-
money option before settlementDate. Result tells the FE the
remaining option position + the underlying-side effect.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: "agent" / "supervisor" / "" (default both). Mirrors actuary_info.type.

get.summary:
GetBankProfitTimeseries buckets realized bank profit over a time
window. Same per-row loss clamp as ListActuaryPerformances, so
Σ buckets over the whole history reconciles with
Σ ListActuaryPerformances.profit_rsd. Gated by `bank.profit.read`.

parameters.name: bucket
parameters.description: "day" (default) / "week" / "month".

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: ticker/name substring

parameters.name: minPrice
parameters.description: Optional range filters; empty strings mean unbounded.

parameters.name: minSettlement
parameters.description:
For futures/options: settlement-date range. Plain YYYY-MM-DD
strings (the FE binds these straight from <input type="date">);
a google.protobuf.Timestamp here can't be bound from a bare date
query param through grpc-gateway, which silently dropped the
filter. Empty string means unbounded.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort by "price", "volume", "maintenance_margin".

get.summary:
GetOptionChain returns the option chain for a stock — call/put
pairs grouped by strike, filtered to the N rows nearest the
shared (current) price per spec p.59.

parameters.name: settlementDate
parameters.description: Settlement date filter; if unset, returns all chains.

parameters.name: strikesWindow
parameters.description:
strikes_window: number of strike rows above and below the at-the-
money strike to return (spec p.59 "filter po broju strike-ova").

parameters.name: userKind
parameters.description:
- USER_KIND_FUND: USER_KIND_FUND identifies investment-fund-as-actor rows (c4 PR3,
spec p.74-75). A fund-actor order's user_id is the fund's id; its
settlement account is the fund's bank account. Fund-actor sells do
not write realized_gains rows — funds are pre-tax vehicles; tax
attaches to the client at withdrawal time (EDGE-3).

parameters.name: userKind
parameters.description:
- USER_KIND_FUND: USER_KIND_FUND identifies investment-fund-as-actor rows (c4 PR3,
spec p.74-75). A fund-actor order's user_id is the fund's id; its
settlement account is the fund's bank account. Fund-actor sells do
not write realized_gains rows — funds are pre-tax vehicles; tax
attaches to the client at withdrawal time (EDGE-3).

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
account_id filters to legs that touch this account on either side.
Empty + employee → see-everything; empty + client → all of caller's
accounts.

parameters.name: opKind
parameters.description: 'payment' | 'transfer' | 'exchange' | 'fee' — keep loose, server enforces.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description:
Spec p.18 / p.24: "filtriranje po datumu" on Pregled računa +
Pregled plaćanja. Both bounds inclusive against
transactions.created_at; either may be omitted.

name.description:
Spec p.20 doesn't pin a length; we cap at 64 to keep the column
bounded and the UI tidy. Min 1 because empty would defeat the
"must differ from current" rule.

cardLimit.description: card_limit must be a positive decimal up to 4 fractional digits.

exerciseOpId.description:
Optional client-supplied idempotency key for the cross-bank
exercise. Gateway forwards into the saga's transaction_id.

quantity.description:
Optional partial-cancel quantity (spec p.57 "otkazivanje celog ili
dela Order-a"). When 0 or >= remaining_quantity, the whole order
is cancelled. When 0 < quantity < remaining_quantity, the order's
target quantity + remaining_quantity drop by this much; already-
executed fills are honoured per spec ("sve ono što je već
izvršeno i naplaćeno mora poštovati").

Number of option contracts to exercise. Must be ≥ 1 and
≤ holding.quantity.

amountRsd.description:
Investment amount in RSD — the fund's accounting unit (spec p.71
ClientFundTransaction.Iznos = "iznos investicije ... u RSD", and
minimumContribution is RSD). The server converts RSD → the source
account's currency for the debit (commission added on top for
clients, none for the bank/actuary). Mirrors WithdrawFromFundRequest.

sourceAccountId.description:
Source account. Client's own RSD/FX account, or — when supervisor
is investing on behalf of the bank — a bank-side RSD/FX account.

onBehalfClientId.description:
When non-empty AND caller is supervisor, the supervisor is
investing in the name of the bank (spec p.75 Napomena 2 — client_id
= BankAsClient sentinel). UUID equality with the sentinel is
enforced server-side.

state.description:
state is one of "open" / "closed" / "after_hours". An empty
string clears the override and falls back to the schedule.

amountRsd.description:
Empty when `withdraw_all` is set — the server then ignores this and
redeems the full position. IGNORE_IF_ZERO_VALUE so an unset amount
skips the pattern; a present-but-malformed amount is still caught,
and an empty amount without withdraw_all is rejected by the handler.

destAccountId.description: Destination account. Same rules as InvestInFundRequest.

withdrawAll.description:
Optional convenience: when true, server ignores `amount_rsd` and
withdraws the full current value of the caller's position.

permissions.description:
Permissions list is bounded; max 64 covers admin's full set with
headroom for c3+ growth.

bankaTradingV1UserKind.description:
- USER_KIND_FUND: USER_KIND_FUND identifies investment-fund-as-actor rows (c4 PR3,
spec p.74-75). A fund-actor order's user_id is the fund's id; its
settlement account is the fund's bank account. Fund-actor sells do
not write realized_gains rows — funds are pre-tax vehicles; tax
attaches to the client at withdrawal time (EDGE-3).

premiumOpId.description: Bank op_id of the premium leg, for ops correlation.

v1Account.description:
Account mirrors spec p.12-13 fields. Money is encoded as a decimal
string (e.g. "180.00") so we don't lose precision over JSON; the
bank service stores it as numeric(20,4).

v1AccountKind.description:
AccountKind picks the broad bucket; the trailing TT in the 18-digit
account number depends on (kind, subtype) per spec p.16. See
pkg/account.Type for the exact mapping.

 - ACCOUNT_KIND_PERSONAL_CHECKING_RSD: lični tekući RSD  (TT=11/13/14/15/16/17 by subtype)
 - ACCOUNT_KIND_PERSONAL_FX: lični devizni     (TT=21)
 - ACCOUNT_KIND_BUSINESS_CHECKING_RSD: poslovni tekući   (TT=12)
 - ACCOUNT_KIND_BUSINESS_FX: poslovni devizni  (TT=22)
 - ACCOUNT_KIND_SYSTEM: bank-owned house  (TT=99, internal)
 - ACCOUNT_KIND_FOREX_BOOK: bank's per-currency FX inventory book (internal, addressable for actuary trading)
 - ACCOUNT_KIND_STATE_TAX: RSD destination for capital-gains tax remittance (internal)
 - ACCOUNT_KIND_FUND: investment fund's liquidity account (c4 PR3, spec p.74; FundsOwnerID sentinel as owner)

v1AccountSubtype.description:
AccountSubtype only applies to Lični Tekući RSD per spec p.12; the
other kinds leave it UNSPECIFIED. New subtypes append.

 - ACCOUNT_SUBTYPE_SAVINGS: štedni
 - ACCOUNT_SUBTYPE_PENSIONER: penzionerski
 - ACCOUNT_SUBTYPE_YOUTH: za mlade
 - ACCOUNT_SUBTYPE_STUDENT: za studente
 - ACCOUNT_SUBTYPE_UNEMPLOYED: za nezaposlene
 - ACCOUNT_SUBTYPE_DOO: Business subtypes (apply to Poslovni Tekući RSD).
 - ACCOUNT_SUBTYPE_FOUNDATION: fondacija

token.description:
The activation token is a 32-byte URL-safe random string (43 chars
base64url, no padding). Be lenient on length but reject obvious
garbage so it can't reach the user service unparsed.

newPassword.description:
Password complexity is enforced server-side in pkg/passwords; the
proto-level rule is just the spec p.10 length window.

profitRsd.description:
profit_rsd is decimal-string RSD. Always positive (negative
contributions are clamped to zero per row before summing).

realizedCount.description:
realized_count is the row count behind profit_rsd — useful for
sanity checks in the FE and the soak suite invariants.

v1ActuaryPerformance.description:
ActuaryPerformance is one row on the supervisor-facing actuary
leaderboard. profit_rsd is the sum of *positive* gain_rsd on
realized_gains rows attributed to this actuary; losses are clamped
to zero per row, matching the capital-gains tax cron's reading.

v1BankFundPosition.description:
BankFundPosition is one row on the "bank's positions in funds"
dashboard (spec p.76 — "Pozicije banke u fondovima"). Wraps the
underlying FundPosition with the fund's display columns so the FE
doesn't need a second round-trip per row.

v1BankProfitBucket.description:
BankProfitBucket is one calendar period. profit_rsd uses the same
per-row loss clamp as the actuary leaderboard (Σ greatest(gain_rsd,
0) on realized_gains where user_kind='employee'), so Σ profit_rsd
across every bucket of the full history reconciles with
Σ ListActuaryPerformances.profit_rsd. trading_rsd + fund_rsd
partition profit_rsd by source (realized_gains.security_id set vs
fund_id set). cumulative_rsd is the running total from the first
bucket in the response.

number.description:
Number is returned masked ("4111********1111") when the caller is
a client; employees with card.write see the full number.

companyId.description: Required for ACCOUNT_KIND_BUSINESS_*; UUID format when set.

openingBalance.description:
Decimal string with up to 4 fraction digits; "0" if absent. Match
the storage scale so we don't quietly truncate.

authorizedPersonId.description: Required for poslovni-with-OvlascenoLice; UUID format when set.

name.description:
Name is optional — service layer falls back to a sensible default
("Debit") when blank. Cap is generous; only the upper bound matters.

cardLimit.description:
card_limit must be a positive decimal. Pattern enforces shape; the
service layer additionally rejects "0" so callers can't bypass via
"0.00".

registryId.description: Matični broj is exactly 8 digits per Serbian APR.

active.description:
Optional so the server can distinguish "absent" (→ default true per
spec p.10: "Po default-u se podrazumeva da je korisnik aktivan")
from an explicit false. Generated as `*bool` in Go.

role.description:
Initial role bundle, applied as a permission set; later admin
actions can amend via SetEmployeePermissions.

managerUserId.description: Optional manager override (defaults to caller). Admin only.

onBehalfOfFundId.description:
c4 PR3 fund-actor (spec p.74-75). When set, the caller is acting on
behalf of an investment fund they manage; the order's owner/account
are the fund's. Validated against the fund row (caller is manager,
account is fund.bank_account_id). Empty for normal client/employee
orders.

v1CreateOrderResponse.description:
CreateOrderResponse wraps the created Order plus advisory flags. Spec
p.57 — *"Obavestiti korisnika ako je berza zatvorena"*: the order
still gets placed, but the FE renders a notice when the security's
exchange is currently closed (not open and not in the after-hours
window). For exchanges without a calendar (forex, options) the flag
is always false.

toAccountNumber.description:
The recipient account is the spec's 18-digit "Račun primaoca". The
mod-11 checksum is verified server-side; here we only enforce the
shape so obviously-invalid input is rejected at the gateway.

amount.description:
Positive decimal in from-account currency, up to 4 fraction digits
(matching the numeric(20,4) storage).

paymentCode.description:
Spec p.21: 3 digits, first one "1" (gotovinska) or "2" (bezgotovinska);
online plaćanja uses 2xx. Default 289 is filled in server-side if empty.

activated.title: false until employee sets initial password

isOpen.description:
is_open is the resolved state at the time of read: applies the
override if set, otherwise computes from local hours + timezone.

isAfterHours.description: is_after_hours is true within 4h of close per spec p.56.

overrideState.description:
override_state carries the admin toggle. Empty string means "no
override, follow schedule"; otherwise one of "open" / "closed" /
"after_hours". The "after_hours" mode forces is_open=false and
is_after_hours=true at any wall-clock so admins can drive the
spec p.56 cadence path during testing.

strikeOpId.description: Bank op_id of the strike-leg cash transfer.

sellerRealizedGainNative.description: Realized-gain row written for the seller (RSD, native).

optionHolding.description:
Updated option holding after the exercise. Quantity may be 0;
the row is left in place for audit (FE filters quantity > 0).

underlyingHolding.description:
Updated underlying holding after the exercise — increased on a
CALL, decreased on a PUT.

bankOpId.description: Bank-side op_id of the cash leg, for ops correlation.

realizedGainNative.description:
PUT only — realized gain on the underlying shares sold at strike.
Both fields are zero for a CALL exercise (cost-basis update via
weighted-avg, no realisation event).

v1ExternalOTCDirection.description:
ExternalOTCDirection encodes who initiated the thread.

 - EXTERNAL_OTC_DIRECTION_OUTGOING: OUTGOING — initiated by a user of this bank against a partner
holding.
 - EXTERNAL_OTC_DIRECTION_INCOMING: INCOMING — partner-initiated against a holding we advertise.

v1ExternalOTCRole.description: ExternalOTCRole says whether the local party is buyer or seller.

v1ExternalOTCSide.description:
ExternalOTCSide identifies which side a thread iteration came
from, scoped to this bank.

v1ExternalOTCThreadStatus.description:
ExternalOTCThreadStatus mirrors the local OTCStatus enum but kept
separate so the two domains can evolve independently.

 - EXTERNAL_OTC_THREAD_STATUS_REJECTED: REJECTED — partner returned a terminal error during a write;
we mark the thread terminal so the user sees a final state.

v1ExternalPublicHolding.description:
ExternalPublicHolding is one row in the discovery aggregation —
flattened across partner banks.

profitRsd.description:
profit_rsd = total_value_rsd − Σ total_invested_rsd across all
positions. Negative when the fund is below contributed capital.

v1Fund.description:
Fund is one investment-fund row. total_value_rsd + profit_rsd are
computed at read time (liquid_rsd + holdings_value_rsd; profit =
total_value − Σ total_invested_rsd across positions).

changeAmt.description:
Spec p.74 fund-detail holdings columns: daily change, traded
volume, and the security's initial margin cost (1.1 ×
maintenance margin), in the holding's currency.

profitRsd.description:
profit_rsd = current_value_rsd − total_invested_rsd. Negative when
the fund has lost value since the client invested.

fundDescription.description:
Fund-level context for the client "Moji fondovi" row (spec p.75:
"Naziv i opis fonda, Vrednost fonda, …"). Computed at read time.

sagaId.description:
saga_id of the invest/withdraw saga so the FE can poll progress on
illiquid withdraws (PR8 tests rely on this).

pending.description:
When true, the withdraw landed on the illiquid path (auto-liquidation
in progress); the transaction stays in pending until orders settle.

totalRsd.description:
Σ profit_rsd across every returned bucket (the last bucket's
cumulative_rsd, or "0" when the window is empty).

position.description:
The caller's position in this fund, when one exists. For supervisors
viewing the bank-as-client slice, pass `client_id` query param.

iterations.description: Every iteration in the thread, oldest first.

contract.description: The signed contract if accept already ran.

reservedCount.description:
c4 (spec p.68) — count of shares committed against outstanding OTC
offers + active OTC contracts. public_count and reserved_count are
orthogonal; the FE renders public_count − reserved_count as the
"available on the OTC board" number.

total.description:
total matches the filter (all, or unread-only); unread is the
caller's total unread count regardless of the filter/page — the FE
renders it as the bell badge.

threads.description: Latest iteration per thread. Sorted newest-first by updated_at.

v1LoanType.title:
- LOAN_TYPE_CASH: gotovinski / keš
 - LOAN_TYPE_HOUSING: stambeni
 - LOAN_TYPE_AUTO: auto
 - LOAN_TYPE_REFINANCE: refinansirajući
 - LOAN_TYPE_STUDENT: studentski

longLivedSession.description:
long_lived_session is set by the mobile app (spec p.84 — no
session interval). When true the user service mints a long-lived
refresh token and the gateway returns it in the response body
instead of relying on the (RN-incompatible) httpOnly cookie. Web
clients leave it false and the cookie flow is unchanged.

userKind.description: user_kind is "client" or "employee" (matches the JWT kind claim).

kind.description:
kind tags the originating event for FE icon/grouping; free-form,
e.g. "payment", "transfer", "card", "order", "otc". Defaults to
"generic".

read.description:
read is true once the user has seen it; read_at is the RFC3339
timestamp it was marked read (empty while unread).

v1Notification.description: Notification is one in-app notification row.

sellerDisplayName.description:
Resolved display name for the seller (mirrors
PublicHoldingItem.seller_display_name). The FE renders this on
"Sklopljeni ugovori"; it fell back to the raw UUID before this.

actorKind.description:
c4 PR3 — actor_kind discriminates whether this order was placed on
behalf of the user themselves or for an investment fund they
manage. on_behalf_of_fund_id is non-empty when actor_kind == FUND.
For backward compat, default actor_kind is whatever user_kind
resolved to at create time (client or employee).

opId.description:
op_id groups the transactions; ListTransactions can filter on it
to render a single grouped row in pregled plaćanja.

lastUpdated.description:
last_updated is the holding's updated_at — spec p.67 OTC portal
"Last updated" column.

v1PublicHoldingItem.description:
PublicHoldingItem is one row on the OTC discovery board. The
"available_count" field is the share count visible to negotiations —
public_count minus reserved_count, clamped to zero.

includeCommission.description:
include_commission: when true the response factors the bank's
menjačnica commission. Set to false for the rates calculator
page where we just want the raw equivalent.

bid.title: bank buys X at this rate (sell-side for client)

ask.title: bank sells X at this rate (buy-side for client)

v1Rate.description:
Rate is one row of the FX table. base/quote are decimal strings to
preserve precision. The pair is directional: from RSD to EUR is a
different row than from EUR to RSD. The menjačnica formula uses
(1 ± margin) on the mid; we store the resolved bid/ask so the bank
service doesn't need to know the spread policy.

v1RealizedPnLRow.description:
RealizedPnLRow is one closing-sell row, decorated with the security
ticker for display. tax_amount_rsd is 15% of max(profit_rsd, 0) per
spec p.62 (losses don't generate tax under the simple model).

written.description: written is the number of (currency→RSD) rate rows upserted.

longLivedSession.description:
Mobile passes its refresh token in the body (no cookie jar) and
keeps long_lived_session=true so the rotated token stays long-
lived. Web omits both — the gateway reads the cookie instead.

dueOn.description:
due_on lets the caller process a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD) for
testing. Empty → today.

asOf.description:
as_of lets the caller process a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD) for
testing. Empty → now.

userId.description: user_id empty = run for everyone with a non-zero unpaid tax.

contractSize.description: Future fields (also reused for forex contract size).

v1Security.description:
Security carries the union of every type's attribute bag. Per-type
fields are populated only when relevant; consumers pick by `type`.

v1SecurityWithListing.description:
SecurityWithListing collapses (security, listing) for the catalog
portal so the FE doesn't need to round-trip per row.

idempotencyKey.description:
Stable across retries; combined with (user_id, source_account_id)
to derive the saga transaction_id. Required.

remoteAccountNumber.description:
18-digit partner-bank account number; checksum (sum%11==0) is
re-validated server-side.

installmentsTotal.description:
Spec p.31: discrete tenor counts; the service-layer further checks
the value against the loan type (housing 60–360, others 12–84).

unpaidTaxRsd.title: tax owed for the current month (15% of pending gains)

fromAccountNumber.description:
The 18-digit account numbers behind from/to_account_id, resolved
server-side. The FE renders these in the "Drugi račun" column — a
client can't (and mustn't be able to) resolve a counterparty
account UUID it doesn't own. Empty when the leg's account isn't a
locally-held bank account (e.g. a future c5 inter-bank peer).

v1Transaction.description:
Transaction is one ledger leg. UX-level operations (a payment, a
transfer) are reconstructed by grouping on op_id.

v1TransactionKind.description:
- TRANSACTION_KIND_EXCHANGE: intermediate leg in a menjačnica path
 - TRANSACTION_KIND_TRADE: trading-service fill settlement
 - TRANSACTION_KIND_TAX: capital-gains tax debit (spec p.62)
 - TRANSACTION_KIND_FOREX_FILL: forex pair fill (spec p.42)
 - TRANSACTION_KIND_OTC_PREMIUM: c4 — OTC + funds money-moving categories.

id.description: For new securities, leave id empty; for updates, supply it.
